heading: Consolidation of financial management systems of Office of Justice Programs
label: 10111 Consolidation of financial management systems of Office of Justice Programs
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Violence Against Women and Department of Justice Reauthorization Act of 2005, and not as part of title I of the Omnibus Crime Control and Safe Streets Act of 1968 which comprises this chapter.Section was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 3715a of Title 42

children.heading: Consolidation of accounting activities and procurement activities
children.label: a Consolidation of accounting activities and procurement activities

children.text: all accounting activities for all elements of the Office of Justice Programs are carried out under the direct management of the Office of the Comptroller; and
all procurement activities for all elements of the Office are carried out under the direct management of the Office of Administration.

children.heading: Further consolidation of procurement activities
children.label: b Further consolidation of procurement activities

children.text: all procurement activities for all elements of the Office are carried out through a single management office; and
all contracts and purchase orders used in carrying out those activities are processed through a single procurement system.

children.heading: Consolidation of financial management systems
children.label: c Consolidation of financial management systems
children.text: The Assistant Attorney General, in coordination with the Chief Information Officer and Chief Financial Officer of the Department of Justice, shall ensure that, on and after , all financial management activities (including human resources, payroll, and accounting activities, as well as procurement activities) of all elements of the Office are carried out through a single financial management system.September 30, 2010

children.heading: Schedule
children.label: 1 Schedule
children.text: The Assistant Attorney General shall undertake a scheduled consolidation of operations to achieve compliance with the requirements of this section.

children.label: A
children.text: subsection (a), the consolidation of operations shall be initiated not later than 90 days after ; andJanuary 5, 2006

children.label: B
children.text: subsections (b) and (c), the consolidation of operations shall be initiated not later than , and shall be carried out by the Office of Administration, in consultation with the Chief Information Officer and the Office of Audit, Assessment, and Management.September 30, 2006
